name: brainstorming
description: Facilitate interactive brainstorming sessions using diverse creative techniques and ideation methods. Use when the user says help me brainstorm or help me ideate.

name: party-mode
description: Orchestrates group discussions between all installed BMAD agents, enabling natural multi-agent conversations. Use when user requests party mode.

name: workflow-status
description: Scan _bmad-output/ artifacts, detect PDLC phase maturity, check DoR gates, report status. Run at start of any session.

name: pdlc-master
description: Full PDLC orchestration: inventory scan, gap detection, gate check, CIS review, write pdlc_state.md.

name: create-story
description: Generate developer-ready story file from epics, PRD, architecture, and tech spec.

name: dev-story
description: TDD-driven story implementation: read story, execute tasks in order, write tests first.

name: sprint-planning
description: Generate or regenerate sprint-status.yaml from epic files. Run after epics and stories are created.

name: code-review
description: Systematic quality, security, and architecture review of changed code files.

name: retrospective
description: Facilitate structured retrospective after an epic is completed. Generate action items.

name: correct-course
description: Recovery workflow when implementation is off-track: diagnose, plan correction, update story.

name: check-implementation-readiness
description: Validate all DoR gates before starting build. Check UX, architecture, security, compliance approvals.

name: create-architecture
description: Generate architecture review document, security review, and deployment design.

name: document-project
description: Brownfield project analysis: scan codebase, generate project-context.md and tech spec.

name: weekly-standup
description: Collect cross-team async standup updates, surface blockers, write summary to status/.

name: okr-checkin
description: Score OKRs, flag reds, recommend adjustments. Write check-in report to planning-artifacts/okrs/.

name: board-prep
description: Aggregate all agent outputs into board pack. Write to status/board-pack.md.

name: health-review
description: Score all customer accounts, generate intervention plans, update 8-growth/customer-health-report.md.

name: qbr-prep
description: Build Quarterly Business Review document for a specific customer account.

name: gtm-plan
description: Create go-to-market strategy: channels, messaging, launch sequence, success metrics.

name: pipeline-review
description: Pipeline stage analysis, weighted forecast, stalled deal alerts, action items.

name: financial-review
description: Monthly burn, revenue, runway, budget vs actual update. Write to status/financial-model.md.

name: runway-projection
description: 3-scenario runway model (base/optimistic/conservative). Write to status/runway-scenarios.md.

name: idea-intake
description: Pull ideas from ClickUp Idea Intake list (901521947569), score them on Impact/Ease/Fit, create 0-portfolio/ brief, update ClickUp status, and create Phase 1 kickoff task.
